focus: Q7+Q8 feature_catalog and manual_testing_playbook validation as playbook types

answer: feature_catalog does NOT validate as --type playbook (no feature_catalog type in template_rules.json); per-feature files are NOT discoverable via per-type contract; both require manual recursion following their own contract

manual_testing_playbook index DOES validate as --type playbook; per-scenario files ARE discoverable as playbook_feature type via path pattern detection; both require manual recursion due to validator limitation
